summary: Customer Payment Flow Completion Pack testing complete. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. My Account page at /account/my-account renders profile form with Personal/Business toggle, delivery defaults, and invoice defaults. Save button calls PUT /api/customer-account/profile successfully. Cart drawer (CartDrawerCompleteFlow) opens from Cart topbar button on /account/marketplace, shows quantity +/- controls and VAT breakdown (18%). Proceed to Payment step shows Contact, Delivery, Invoice details prefilled from profile. Complete Payment creates order + invoice + payment via POST /api/customer-payment/checkout-fixed-price. My Account link appears in sidebar navigation.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps Complete Payment button at bottom of drawer - requires scroll or force click to access

critical_code_review_comments: customer_account_and_payment_routes.py correctly implements all 5 endpoints with proper MongoDB integration
MyAccountProfilePage.jsx properly uses useCustomerProfile hook and calls PUT /api/customer-account/profile on save
CartDrawerCompleteFlow.jsx correctly fetches prefill data from /api/customer-account/prefill and submits to /api/customer-payment/checkout-fixed-price
VAT calculation is correct: 18% applied to subtotal
CustomerPortalLayoutV2.jsx sidebar correctly includes My Account link with UserCircle icon
useCustomerProfile.js hook properly handles GET and PUT operations for profile data
seed_data_creation: Test profile data created for customer during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Payment Flow Completion Pack fully tested. My Account page at /account/my-account with Personal/Business toggle, delivery defaults, invoice defaults. Cart drawer (CartDrawerCompleteFlow) on /account/* routes with quantity controls, VAT breakdown, and complete payment flow. APIs: GET/PUT /api/customer-account/profile, GET /api/customer-account/prefill, POST /api/customer-payment/checkout-fixed-price, POST /api/customer-payment/approve-quote-create-invoice. All data persists to MongoDB.

Backend API Tests.test_save_profile_business_account: PASS - Saves business account with TIN/VAT
Backend API Tests.test_prefill_returns_saved_details: PASS - Returns delivery/invoice details for checkout
Backend API Tests.test_prefill_returns_default_for_unknown: PASS - Returns default for unknown customer
Backend API Tests.test_checkout_creates_order_invoice_paym: PASS - Creates order, invoice, payment with correct VAT calculation
Backend API Tests.test_checkout_requires_customer_id_and_i: PASS - Returns 400 when required fields missing
Backend API Tests.test_checkout_handles_single_item: PASS - Handles single item with correct VAT

Frontend - My Account Page.Save functionality: PASS - Calls PUT API, shows alert, data persists

Frontend - Cart Drawer (CartDrawerComple.Complete Payment flow: PASS - Creates order KON-ORD-*, shows success alert, closes drawer
